programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Gullivers Travels
programme.desc: Surgeon Lemuel Gulliver a softhearted colonial is washed ashore an island called Sumatra The Land of Lilliput after a shipwreck

programme.title: TBH 104
programme.desc: TBH 104

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: When Kates old friend Emily Mapes comes to the Shady Rest she notices that Kate is unmarried and wants to see her wed Emily recruits Kates daughters to round up some bachelors to go to the Shady Rest to court Kate However Uncle Joe thinks that if Kate finds a man he will lose his job

programme.title: Munsters 136
programme.desc: Munsters 136

programme.title: Addams Family 113
programme.desc: Addams Family 113

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie falls for Jack Chenault but will she move to Alaska with him Twins Judy and Joanie unhappy with marriage consider switching husbands Separated ventriloquists Mike and Pat Harmon are in the same cabin and entertain in the lounge

programme.title: Daktari 319
programme.desc: Daktari 319

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A precognitive young woman sees herself being murdered but it is her unknown twin sister who turns up dead

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Mary Beth is taken hostage by a very dangerous man

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After one full year of marriage Luke and Kate finally get to go on their honeymoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke McCoy is tricked into buying a swimming pool

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A fast food owner has only one goal in life - to utterly destroy and humiliate his competition However he gets a taste of his own medicine

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A gorgeous but deadly dancer who manipulates men easily and kills for kicks succeeds in drawing Nick into her dangerous web

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A ventriloquists dummy becomes a vessel for evil when it comes to life and demands that its master commit murder

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After a man scorns his lover he resorts to drastic measures to ensure that his family doesnt learn of their affair but his plan hardly goes off without a hitch Later a man literally tries to cheat death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer has unforeseen complications when pursued by a determined motorcycle cop in a barren desert

programme.title: Smart 523
programme.desc: Smart 523

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: All goes well when Hogans gang steals Klinks code book from his safe photographs the contents and returns it to its proper place But theres a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton from building his new Officers Club on McHales island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Santa McHale must practice some psychological warfare when he the crew Binghamton and a war correspondent are captured by a Japanese patrol while on a mission to bring some Christmas joy to the children of a nearby orphanage

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A Colonel and his young daughter are visiting Camp Henderson While befriending the little girl Pyle has no problem getting her and himself in trouble with everyone

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper trains Gilligan to be his replacement leader in case he is captured by savages But when The Skipper is actually captured by savages can Gilligan actually take control

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George gets into a dustup with Grampa over a used vacuum cleaner which George wants to give to Kate as a gift

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Pepino feels his job is threatened when Grampa takes on another hired hand

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac overhears mystery writers researching a book and thinks theyre plotting to kill Merrill A rock star falls for a deaf woman Docs honeymooning friend Mitzi thinks her new husband Vinnie doesnt really love her

programme.title: WKRP 102
programme.desc: WKRP 102

programme.title: WKRP 117
programme.desc: WKRP 117

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: After another on-field humiliation Wood quits as football coach and opens a sporting goods store

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Will wants a rare racing set for Christmas and Herman manages to find itfour hours away He and Wood set out on Christmas Eve to get it and find themselves stranded when their car breaks down

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: The sheriff discovers that a shooting victim had two wives the Feds shut down the Savoys skim to Chicago Dixon helps a young actress in town to shoot a movie and both sheriff Lamb and Vincent suspect that Jack killed Johnny Rizzo

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A friend of Jonathan Harts is killed in a motor accident just after he has left a health farm apparently committing suicide There was no warning of him being troubled so the Harts go undercover to find out what happened at the farm

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons decide to leave Earth when it appears that the Jiridians are invading Meanwhile a group of Resistance prisoners saved from the mother ship include several disguised Jiridians who are causing trouble for Liam and Renee

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood Project investigates individuals who claim to have had close encounters The team stumbles onto an alien plot involving implanting something into victims bodies for the study of the human immune system setting them free and collecting them later to learn the results Harrison ends up dating one of the victims Karen McKinney

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills father an adventurer by trade arrives in town to search for a rare flower

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The arrival of the Alphans on another planet seems to cause a change in its atmosphere setting off pollution and poisoning of the water They meet Zoran the sole survivor of the last exploratory force who tells them that the planet is controlled by an immortal being - with whom Koenig must parley if he and his crew are to leave the planet alive

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 110
programme.desc: Hercules 110

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Domestic dissension helps the police in their pursuit of a family of con artists; guests Michael Ansara Philip Ahn

programme.title: Mission Imposssible
programme.desc: In a rare episode of the series in which the IM Force isnt sent on a government-sanctioned mission theyre forced by a criminal named Egan whos kidnapped the daughter of a friend of Briggs to capture a heavily guarded witness in a trial against him They know Egan plans to kill the witness but Briggs is put in a tight spot and is determined that Egan wont get a chance to kill the witness

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.title: The Fugitive S3 E10
programme.desc: Stranded in an abandoned town and awaiting help the blind Mrs Gerard Barbara Rush realizes she is with Kimble David Janssen With her husband on the way she delays Kimbles departure hoping his capture will end her husbands obsession and save her marriage

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When a smooth talking stranger comes to Heath claiming hes his father Heath agrees to travel to the town of his mothers grave to investigate the story

programme.desc: Chey 503

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades gain an ally in Trident a cybernetichuman mix who takes the worlds leaders hostage

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill cons a well-meaning alien into helping liberate GoBotron by attacking the Guardians

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jal Rorda Audrics loyal friend is tricked and captured by Saw Boss where the evil scientist Dr Zorg is zapping him with the mindsifter to discover Audrics whereabouts Jayce defies Saw Boss and goes to the planet Nar to rescue Jal Gorda

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Oon is recalled by the Squire Smith for his obvious fear in the face of Monster Minds Oon fears he will be melted down Upon arriving on the Squire Smiths planet Oon walks into a trap set by Monster Minds He then proves himself to the Squire
